name: Team Jealous
subject: You're Invited: Education Meet and Greet with Ben
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Join us Saturday evening for a meet and greet with Ben!
#
Friends,
Not too long ago, Maryland schools ranked first in the nation, but sadly we've fallen to sixth, and Governor Hogan has failed to offer a concrete plan to get us back to number one. In fact, despite claims that he's funding schools at "record levels," students spent the winter freezing in their classrooms.
Our young people deserve more, and as leaders, we have to set a better example. What does it say to our kids about their value when no one takes responsibility or demands accountability when the system fails them?
As a civil rights leader, community organizer, and businessman, Ben has spent his life bringing people together to get big things done. Those experiences have taught him that change begins with leadership that can inspire people to come together. Saturday night, we'll be gathering together to discuss how we move our state forward. **[RSVP here to let us know you're coming.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a711/7ab0e2c4/7f4a6150/349a1b81/2502028041/VEsH/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/education-meet-and-greet-pg?source=EMD02198A") **
Hope to see you there,
Team Jealous
[](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a711/7ab0e2c4/7f4a6150/349a1b81/2502028041/VEsE/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/education-meet-and-greet-pg?source=EMD02198A")

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

The days after Parkland

Following last Wednesday’s horrific shooting at a Parkland, Florida, high school, President Donald J. Trump addressed the Nation and issued a Proclamation honoring the victims and their families.

On Friday, the President and First Lady visited with survivors at a Florida hospital and addressed law enforcement officers at the Broward County Sheriff’s Office to pay their respects and express their full support. The President also spoke with local officials such as Parkland Mayor Christine Hunschofsky to receive updates and thank them for their leadership.

“Our entire Nation, w/one heavy heart, continues to pray for the victims & their families in Parkland, FL,” the President tweeted Friday. “To teachers, law enforcement, first responders & medical professionals who responded so bravely in the face of danger: We THANK YOU for your courage!”

The President also spoke with Senate Majority Whip John Cornyn (R-TX) about proposed legislation to strengthen the Nation’s background-checks system for firearms. While discussions are still ongoing, Press Secretary Sarah Sanders said yesterday, President Trump is supportive of the effort.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b5b0b64ac74e9a5214d4202268a1d8574c8a045c05033cfc92f2033404efd793aad31bdb84759ce0a0c6230d851a217167e9a7f41267e28c
Watch President Trump speak at Broward Health North Hospital.

Presidents’ Day—or ‘Washington’s Birthday’?

Since 1971, Federal employees have enjoyed a three-day holiday weekend each February. Yet while yesterday’s sales at malls across the country may have reminded you to celebrate “Presidents’ Day,” the official Federal holiday remains “Washington’s Birthday” on the books.

Given the proximity of the holiday to Abraham Lincoln’s birthday, Rep. Robert McClory (R-IL) attempted to change the name of the holiday to “Presidents’ Day” in 1968. But the measure proved to be particularly controversial for legislators from Virginia, George Washington’s home state, and it was soon dropped.

Another fact: Washington’s Birthday is honored on the third Monday of each February, but because his actual birth date is February 22, the Federal holiday will never be celebrated on his real birthday.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b5b0b64ac74e9a52143f64ee1ea77f1e7daafa9cfe37089890bf74c9ed1d2f39f5aea3533042f4f9b4f034df30d846b11ef41f198107d4c8
Read more on the historic debate between “Presidents’ Day” and “Washington’s Birthday.”

Democrats punt on DACA

Last week, Senate Democrats—led by Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY)—blocked an effort to begin voting on real immigration reform that would offer a path to legalization for 1.8 million DACA-eligible illegal immigrants.

“I thought my friends across the aisle would jump at this opportunity to fulfill what they say is their top priority,” Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) said. “But they just could not take ‘yes’ for an answer. . . . They decided they’d rather come away empty handed, with no resolution whatsoever for the 1.8 million individuals they say they are championing, than accept a reasonable compromise with the president.”

President Trump noted this morning that the Democrats’ obstructionism is hurting them with American voters. “Republicans are now leading the Generic Poll [for November’s midterm elections],” the President tweeted, citing the popularity of tax cuts.
“Also, they want to do nothing on DACA, R’s want to fix!”

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b5b0b64ac74e9a52588545a8f93e5025dec63686693e1203aa1fb17570cf394b1c2703f691718e221f5bf3d95a3dd616ce154e199d229b38
What people are saying about the Senate Minority’s immigration obstructionism

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump visit Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School student Maddy Wilford her family | February 16, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will have lunch with Vice President Mike Pence and Secretary of Homeland Security Kirstjen Nielsen. In the afternoon, the President will meet with Secretary of the Treasury Steve Mnuchin and later host a Public Safety Medal of Valor Awards ceremony.

After having lunch with the President and Secretary of Homeland Security, the Vice President and Second Lady will travel to NASA's Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The two will participate in a tour of Cape Canaveral Air Force Station’s launch facilities and later attend a reception hosted by the Commercial Spaceflight Federation, Coalition for Deep Space Exploration, American Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics, Aerospace Industries Association, and Space Florida.

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Add your name: Protect Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Let's set the record straight, Friends: **Republicans' so-called "paid family leave" plan is simply a cruel trick to slash Social Security and further burden working families.**
Under the GOP's plan, parents would be faced with an impossible choice: If you take paid leave today - to care for a newborn daughter or a sick father - you'll be penalized and won't get your long-promised Social Security benefits on time.
It's unacceptable and un-American.
This plan overwhelmingly discriminates against struggling Americans, whose employment packages give them fewer days off and less flexibility.
**No family should be forced to decide between caring for a loved one and retiring with dignity - which is why I'm fighting this bill with everything I've got.** But I need you to join me in this fight:
**[Click here right now to tell the GOP: Don't make families choose between retirement and paid family leave!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/falsechoice?firstname=Friends&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fcjs-socialsecurity%3Fcode%3Djtk826-ja-core-nd)**
Thank you,
Jeanne

subject: NEW POLL: two things we just learned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

Hello,

**1\. The primary is basically tied.**

**2\. Gillum outperforms Graham in a hypothetical general election vs. Putnam.**

Gravis just put out a new poll of the gubernatorial primary and general election.

Andrew Gillum, the most progressive candidate in our state's history, is outperforming Democrat Gwen Graham in a general election matchup with the leading GOP candidate who describes himself as an "NRA Sellout," Adam Putnam. This is huge news.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b1/9e00690/42412c87/2403bee8/2231000985/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180220_Poll_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180220_Poll_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_content=2")
It's huge because it confirms what we already know -- as Democrats, we have to nominate a progressive who is exciting, authentic, and will get out the vote in a general election.

Let's also make something very clear: We've been outspent by every other campaign -- by a lot. Yet we are polling basically margin of error tied with our primary opponents, including one who has already spent $4 million on TV. By comparison, we've spent $0 on TV.

That will change. And when it does, we expect to pull ahead.

**[Every $1 you invest in this campaign goes further and does more to fund a Democratic win in November than any other campaign. And you can also rest easy knowing it's going to fund a true progressive message.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b1/9e00690/42412c87/2403beeb/2231000985/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180220_Poll_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180220_Poll_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_content=3+-+Every+1+you+invest+in+this+campaign+goes")**

Andrew Gillum is one of us.

1\. He's taken on the NRA -- and won.
2\. He stood up to Donald Trump and Republicans who seek to divide us.
3\. He supports Medicare for All.
4\. He supports a $15 minimum wage.
5\. He'll reverse $1 billion in Trump Corporate Tax breaks and put money into our public schools.

The list goes on and on.

I understand if you've been on the sidelines, waiting to invest. Conventional wisdom says a candidate like Mayor Gillum can't be the Democratic nominee. He's too progressive, he's the son of a construction worker and school bus driver, and he isn't famous.

But for Democrats, conventional wisdom has meant nothing but general election losses.

**[With your investment, time and money, Andrew Gillum will win this primary.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b1/9e00690/42412c87/2403beea/2231000985/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180220_Poll_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180220_Poll_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_content=4+-+With+your+investment+time+and+money+Andr")**

And together, we will make history by winning the general election.

Now is our time.

Scott Arceneaux
Senior Strategist

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Add your name: Sign my pledge
body:
In 2018, I am going to work tirelessly to ensure we elect a Congress that is willing to stand up to the gun lobby.
---
Derek --

I know politicians fear the gun lobby.

But I also know that fear cannot compare to what those innocent children in Florida felt as the gunshots rang out, bullets flew through the halls of their school, and their teachers and classmates were gunned down.

That fear is nothing compared to what parents must have felt waiting in the parking lot of the high school waiting for news about their children.

Our nation's schools should be the safest spaces in our communities. They should not be the place of horror. And while I wish that the scenes from earlier this week were unthinkable or unimaginable, they are not.

We have seen them before, and we will see them again... unless our elected leaders show the courage to act -- the courage to finally take on the gun lobby.

**But that will only happen when politicians realize they have more to fear from all of us together than they do from the gun lobby. And that starts with making our voices heard:**

**[Sign my pledge: "I promise that I will Vote Courage in November and support candidates who will stand up to the gun lobby and take action to make our communities safer from gun violence."](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/take-gabbys-pledge?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Sign+my+pledge+I+promise+that+I+will+Vot&utm_campaign=em_20180220_gg_nd&source=em_20180220_gg_nd")**

For a long time I bought into the fiction that after a horrific shooting, there is a required period of silence -- where we aren't supposed to act. I know people felt that way after I was shot, as well.

But the truth is, the only one who benefits from that waiting period is the gun lobby -- which is why their defenders offer little more than "thoughts and prayers" for the families and condemnations for anyone who demands that our communities deserve more.

In 2018, I am going to work tirelessly to ensure we elect a Congress that is willing to stand up to the gun lobby. And I know the Democratic National Committee will do the same.

**Add your name. Pledge to Vote Courage in 2018:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Take-the-Pledge](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/take-gabbys-pledge?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+httpsmydemocratsorgTakethePledge&utm_campaign=em_20180220_gg_nd&source=em_20180220_gg_nd")**

Every day we fail to take action, we choose this fate. We tolerate politicians who fail to acknowledge this crisis and vote against our safety. We let our gun violence epidemic continue day after deadly day.

This cycle has to end. And it will end... with us.

All my best,

Gabby Giffords

**[SIGN THE PLEDGE](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/take-gabbys-pledge?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+THE+PLEDGE&utm_campaign=em_20180220_gg_nd&source=em_20180220_gg_nd")**

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052200d/4067b0a/565a042cc/7e55a38f/2086027949/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180220_gg_nd&source=em_20180220_gg_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052200d/4067b0a/565a042cc/7e55a38d/2086027949/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180220_gg_nd&source=em_20180220_gg_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: ALERT@bobcasey.com
subject: student debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
After giving massive tax breaks to its billionaire corporate donors, the Trump administration wants to close its budget gap by hurting the future of this country: our students.

The budget proposed by the Trump administration last week will make college cost more for students. Not only that, but _the proposal eliminates Public Loan Service Forgiveness_ , which rewards students who choose to give back to their communities after graduation.

**_[Add your name: Tell the president you value our students more than his corporate donors.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6a11/51dbcc2a/b84839f/3a318c9/2219062400/VEsH/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/student-loans-petition?refcode=em_20180220_so_nd&source=em_20180220_so_nd")_**

Our students already face tuition costs drastically higher than most of the developed world. Pennsylvania has the second highest average student-loan debt in the nation, and 71% of our students graduate with some debt. Now, the Trump administration wants to keep those students buried under mountains of debt for years to come. Enough is enough.

**_[Sign the Petition](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6a11/51dbcc2a/b84839f/3a318c9/2219062400/VEsE/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/student-loans-petition?refcode=em_20180220_so_nd&source=em_20180220_so_nd")_**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Trump's anti-environment budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
President Trump's budget is a disaster for Washington's environment. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cba/2f5ea88d/7342fc7f/2cbc955f/4282310530/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/environment-cuts?utm_source=ema_2018-02-20_environment-buget-cuts&source=ema_2018-02-20_environment-buget-cuts&utm_campaign=environment-buget-cuts&utm_medium=ema") Friend, President Trump's budget proposal is a disaster for the environment and our much-needed efforts to combat climate change. If the president gets his way, funding for the Environmental Protection Agency will be slashed by **23%**. Clean energy research will be gutted by **72%**. And more than a dozen climate change programs are headed for the chopping block. Here in our state, funding to clean up the Hanford nuclear reservation will be cut by **$230 million** \-- a huge blow to ongoing efforts to eliminate radioactive hazards to workers, Washingtonians, and our environment. State and tribal assistance grants for inspecting brownfields and monitoring toxic substances are in line for a **45%** cut. _And federal funding for the ongoing clean-up of Puget Sound will be eliminated entirely._ The Trump administration is wielding a partisan political axe putting the health and safety of Washingtonians at risk for generations. [**Sign on now to defend the environment from partisan budget cuts. Add your name here.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cba/2f5ea88d/7342fc7f/2cbc955f/4282310530/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/environment-cuts?utm_source=ema_2018-02-20_environment-buget-cuts&source=ema_2018-02-20_environment-buget-cuts&utm_campaign=environment-buget-cuts&utm_medium=ema") The Trump budget severely impedes the significant progress we've made in keeping our state's water and air clean for our families -- and our families' families. And -- as we've come to expect from this president -- it refuses to acknowledge that climate change is a real and present threat. Rather than making sustainable energy a major priority, as we are doing in Washington, the Trump administration is playing politics with our future -- and the future of our children. It's clear climate change deniers are driving the decision-making. [**We can't allow our future to be devastated by partisan politics. Defend the environment from President Trump's budget cuts. Sign on here.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cba/2f5ea88d/7342fc7f/2cbc955f/4282310530/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/environment-cuts?utm_source=ema_2018-02-20_environment-buget-cuts&source=ema_2018-02-20_environment-buget-cuts&utm_campaign=environment-buget-cuts&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cba/2f5ea88d/7342fc7f/2cbc955f/4282310530/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/environment-cuts?utm_source=ema_2018-02-20_environment-buget-cuts&source=ema_2018-02-20_environment-buget-cuts&utm_campaign=environment-buget-cuts&utm_medium=ema")

subject: Support for our working families tax cut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
body:
"Americans for Tax Reform applauds Governor Greitens' proposal to provide significant tax relief for Missouri taxpayers and encourages the legislature to pass the plan."
Peter,
When we set out to reform Missouri's tax code, we focused our efforts on these key principles:
* Cut taxes for working families.
* Lower taxes for businesses to create more jobs.
* End loopholes that primarily benefit big businesses and high earners to responsibly cut taxes without breaking our budget.
* Cut taxes in a way that is fiscally sound, maintains our state’s triple-A credit rating, and does not burden our children with debt.

Our plan does just that, but we need your support to get it to the finish line. (https://ericgreitens.com/support-tax-cuts/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=32dbc821a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_02_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-32dbc821a7-99411629)

Our tax cut plan cuts taxes for 97% of Missourians. It eliminates the state income tax for 380,000 working Missourians.

In our continued efforts to make Missouri more competitive for new jobs and industry, we are taking the corporate income tax down to the 2nd lowest in the nation.

We have put an end to special interest rip-offs that have plagued Missouri taxpayers for years.

And, our plan is fiscally sound and revenue-neutral.

The leading conservative tax reform group in the country, Americans for Tax Reform, supports our plan. Here's more of what they had to say about it (https://www.atr.org/eric-greitens-proposes-800-million-tax-relief-plan-missouri-taxpayers?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=32dbc821a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_02_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-32dbc821a7-99411629) :

"A $787 million tax cut for Missouri taxpayers, significantly improving the business climate and increasing take home pay for the average family."

Add your name here if you would like to see our tax reform plan passed and signed into law >> (https://ericgreitens.com/support-tax-cuts/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=32dbc821a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_02_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-32dbc821a7-99411629)

We need your support (https://ericgreitens.com/support-tax-cuts/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=32dbc821a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_02_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-32dbc821a7-99411629) to ensure that this tax cut for working families becomes a reality.

Let's get it done.
- Eric

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=32dbc821a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_02_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-32dbc821a7-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=32dbc821a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_02_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-32dbc821a7-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. name: Gabby Giffords via BernieSanders.com
subject: Here's how we beat the gun lobby
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Speaking is still physically difficult for me, but my feelings are clear: I am furious.
#
Friends -
Speaking is still physically difficult for me, but my feelings are clear: I am furious.
We have watched, time and time again, as people describe these mass shootings as unimaginable and unpreventable acts of evil.
But we all know that is not true.
We have seen them before, and we will see them again. And what angers me most is that Congress knows how to solve this problem.
Bernie Sanders has fought to reduce the epidemic levels of gun violence in this country. And at the end of the day, both of us know that the root of this issue lies in the outrageous amounts of money the corporate gun lobby spends buying candidates and elected officials.
So if we want to change the equation, that means Congress must realize they have more to fear from all of us standing together and acting than they do from the gun lobby's money.
**That starts with all of us making our voices heard. So today I am asking you to do something important, I am asking you to take my pledge.**
**[Sign my pledge: "I promise that I will Vote Courage in November and support candidates who will stand up to the gun lobby and take action to make our communities safer from gun violence."](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/gabbys-pledge?source=em180220-full-t1 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/gabbys-pledge?source=em180220-full-t1")**
****[SIGN GABBY'S PLEDGE](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/gabbys-pledge?source=em180220-full-t1 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/gabbys-pledge?source=em180220-full-t1")****
For decades now, the gun lobby has used its power and influence to instill fear into the hearts of legislators in Congress and state capitals across our country.
But that fear is nothing like what those students fleeing Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School must have felt as they ran out of the building with their hands in the air as officers ran toward them with their guns drawn.
That fear is nothing like what the children and teachers must have felt at Sandy Hook Elementary School, or the club goers felt in Orlando, or the holiday party attendees felt in San Bernardino as shots rang out all around them.
What those legislators who vote to put the profits of manufacturers ahead of the safety of our communities really feel is cowardice.
They look at the most benign and practical solutions offered by moderates from each party and then they look over their shoulder at the powerful, shadowy gun lobby and choose to do nothing.
This November, we are going to vote them out. But it will only happen if we stand together. And that starts with making your voice heard.
**Join me and Senator Bernie Sanders. Pledge to Vote Courage in 2018:**
**[https://go.berniesanders.com/gabbys-pledge](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/gabbys-pledge?source=em180220-full-t1 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/gabbys-pledge?source=em180220-full-t1")**
We do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as routine, and we must never stop demanding that our leaders not only acknowledge this devastating problem, but take long overdue action to keep our children safe.
If Congress won't act, the American voters must.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: keep Putin out of our elections!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Over the past month, Director of National Intelligence Dan Coats, FBI Director Christopher Wray, CIA Director Mike Pompeo, and Secretary of State Rex Tillerson have all said that Russia is planning to interfere in our 2018 midterm election.

Despite this unanimous warning, President Trump has refused to acknowledge the significance of this threat and has taken NO action to prevent future attacks by Russia on our democratic system. It's crystal clear that if our country is to be protected from Russian meddling, we cannot count on the President to take action.

**We 're not just going to sit here and let Russia -- or anyone else -- get away with interfering in our elections again. If the Trump administration won't act, then Congress must. That's why I introduced the bipartisan DETER Act in January, to make sure foreign actors know that they will automatically be sanctioned if they are caught messing with our democratic process.

[Tell the Senate to act immediately to pass the DETER Act and protect the integrity of our elections. Click here to sign the petition and show your support.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91873/70cdc2ba/46fa3b8e/3903d92/1233591259/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/keep-putin-out-of-our-elections-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Tell+the+Senate+to+act+immediately+to+pa&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180220&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180220")**

The DETER Act sends a clear message to Russia and other foreign actors that if they attack American candidates, campaigns, or voting infrastructure, they will automatically trigger severe, economically damaging sanctions. That means Vladimir Putin will know that if he gets caught meddling in our elections, Russia will pay a price.

This November, Americans will head to the ballot box for our midterm elections, and two years later for our next presidential election. I hope you'll join me in calling on Congress not to drag its feet but to act now to defend the integrity of our democratic process.

[**Join me to urge the Senate to pass the DETER Act before more foreign actors are able to interfere in our elections.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91873/70cdc2ba/46fa3b8e/3903d93/1233591259/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/keep-putin-out-of-our-elections-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Join+me+to+urge+the+Senate+to+pass+the+D&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180220&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180220")

Democracy is worth fighting for -- and no time is more urgent than now.

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

Less than one week after claiming that he votes in line with President Donald Trump 62% of the time, Democrat Joe Donnelly is... | | | [View this email in your browser](http://mailchi.mp/indiana/hypocrisy-watchdemocrat-donnelly-changes-his-mind-again-attacks-vice-president-pence?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| | **Hypocrisy Watch:**** **
Democrat Donnelly Changes His Mind (Again!) & Attacks Vice President Pence
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5fb81565b8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| He's at it again! Less than one week after claiming that he votes in line with the Trump-Pence agenda 62% of the time, **Democrat Joe Donnelly is already reversing course.**

Democrat Donnelly's campaign this week sent [an email to supporters](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d1901388ec&e=1acd9bb3d6) distancing himself from President Donald Trump's administration and attempting to raise money, all while disparaging Vice President Mike Pence's work for Hoosiers both at the Statehouse and in Washington, D.C.

**Less than one week -- 144 hours, to be exact -- separate Donnelly's claim that he votes alongside President Trump and his attack on our own Vice President Pence.**

But, of course, this isn't the first time we've seen Donnelly zigzag across the board on major issues. Take these examples where we saw two Donnellys -- Indiana Joe and DC Donnelly -- within days of each other:
* **Indiana Joe:** On Sept. 5, 2017, Donnelly [told a reporter that](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=de7769a9e6&e=1acd9bb3d6), “a lot of those Trump voters are Joe Donnelly voters."
* **DC Donnelly:** Just days later on Sept. 14, 2017, Donnelly [said during a podcast with former Obama aide David Axelrod](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dd8d862768&e=1acd9bb3d6) that people who voted for President Trump don't represent "who America is" (fast forward to the 0:53:30 mark for this comment).
* **Indiana Joe:** Last week, Donnelly [circulated a press release](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b70d047b98&e=1acd9bb3d6) claiming that he votes in line with President Trump's priorities 62 percent of the time.
* **DC Donnelly:** This week, Donnelly [sent out an email](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=50a85b832b&e=1acd9bb3d6) attempting to raise money while attacking Vice President Pence.

We think that Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle said it best:

**"Democrat Joe Donnelly changes his position as frequently as the weather changes in Indiana. ****Just last week, he was claiming he supports the Trump-Pence agenda, and this week he's attacking Vice President Mike Pence. I've never before seen a candidate like Donnelly who tries to fool Hoosiers into thinking he's everything to everyone. Through all of the contradicting rhetoric, though, it's clear that when it matters most -- on issues like cutting federal taxes and fixing health care -- he stands directly against Hoosier values and the Trump-Pence priorities in Washington." **

Indiana Joe, DC Donnelly...at the end of the day, we know it's all just Democrat Donnelly, and that it's time for him to go.

body:
#
Friend -
In Maryland, we pride ourselves on having some of the best public schools in the country. Not too long ago, our schools ranked first in the nation, but sadly we've fallen to sixth, and Governor Hogan has failed to offer a concrete plan to get back to number one.
The governor has proposed cuts to Maryland's education funding formula and critical education programs focused on helping low-income students get an equal chance at an excellent education; he's implemented cuts to programs for special education students, lost educator positions and delayed school building maintenance while children in places like Baltimore froze in their classrooms.
[**What does it say to our youth about their value when no one takes responsibility or demands accountability when the system fails them? If you believe we need leaders who will put our young people first, donate $5 right now to our campaign today.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a72a/7ab0e2c4/7f44c169/349a1888/75869272/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst2-18?refcode=OHQ02208A")
**Enough is enough.**
Being a leader isn't just about implementing sound policies, it's also about being a moral compass and living the values that make up the best of us. As we watch Donald Trump and Republicans continue to erode our ethical standards, we need leaders at the state level who are willing to stand up and be called to account for their actions, especially when it comes to our youth.
Here in Maryland, too often we see hard work is not the only determinant of success. Too often, luck plays a determining role in who can achieve a good quality of life and who cannot. The best thing we can do for the next generation is provided them with the tools they need to shape their destiny.
[**Providing our kids with a high-quality education is the first step to making sure their future is determined by their hard work. If you**agree** , chip in here.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a72a/7ab0e2c4/7f44c169/349a1888/75869272/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst2-18?refcode=OHQ02208A")
Onward,
Ben

**[DONATE](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a72a/7ab0e2c4/7f44c169/349a1888/75869272/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst2-18?refcode=OHQ02208A")**

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a72a/7ab0e2c4/7f44c169/349a188b/75869272/VEsC/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a72a/7ab0e2c4/7f44c169/349a188a/75869272/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a72a/7ab0e2c4/7f44c169/349a18f5/75869272/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a72a/7ab0e2c4/7f44c169/349a18f4/75869272/VEsB/ "https://secure.benjealous.com/page/contribute/donate?source=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.
